# Lencho

> Premium artificial jewellery and handmade woollen accessories store in India.

## Website

- [Home](https://lencho.in/)
- [Jewellery products](https://lencho.in/products)
- [Woollen collection](https://lencho.in/woollen)
- [Track order](https://lencho.in/track)
- [Contact](https://lencho.in/contact)

## Policies

- [Terms and Conditions](https://lencho.in/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://lencho.in/privacy)
- [Shipping Policy](https://lencho.in/shipping)
- [Returns and Refunds](https://lencho.in/returns)
- [Cancellation Policy](https://lencho.in/cancellation)
- [Payment and COD](https://lencho.in/payment-policy)
- [Grievance](https://lencho.in/grievance)

## Notes for agents

Lencho sells artificial jewellery and handmade woollen products. Product prices, availability, delivery charges, offers, and policies should be read from the live website before answering users.

Do not place orders or submit customer data without explicit user confirmation.
